name: event-horizon
description: An IDE for the agent era — a local-first, markdown-backed ticket board and orchestration layer for coding agents.
author: guybnd

scripts.build: npm run build -w portal && npm run build -w engine
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w portal && npm run typecheck -w engine
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w portal && npm run lint -w engine
scripts.check: npm run check:boundary && npm run check:git-exec && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test -w engine
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run package -w engine
scripts.package:win: npm run build && npm run package:win -w engine
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && npm run package:mac -w engine
scripts.dist:all: npm run dist:source && npm run dist:mac && npm run dist:win
